title: monarda citriodora
intro: Monarda citriodora, also known as Lemon Bee Balm, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, and is valued for its fragrant leaves and flowers, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including sore throats, colds, and skin irritations. Lemon Bee Balm can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in herbal remedies to promote digestion, reduce stress, and boost the immune system.
